name: Jay Anderson
description: American jazz double-bassist and studio musician
abstract: Jay Anderson (born October 24, 1955) is an American jazz double-bassist and studio musician.

about_quotes.speaker: Mark Soskin
about_quotes.evidence: I always know that they’re going to do what I like them to do. You know say Jay Anderson for one, the bass player. ... I usually use Jay Anderson on bass. I’m very comfortable playing with Jay.
about_quotes.doc_title: Mark Soskin interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, September 17, 2021

about_quotes.speaker: Chuck Lamb
about_quotes.evidence: Usually it’s like this record I did with Harvey Sorgen and Jay Anderson
about_quotes.doc_title: Chuck Lamb interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, February 7, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: Rich Perry’s on the rest, along with Mulgrew Miller, Jay Anderson, and Victor Lewis.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
